description: ## Component: hx-date-picker (NEW) **Tier 2 — Standard Enterprise | Industry Consensus: 3/6 libraries | HEALTHCARE-CRITICAL** Calendar-based date selection with text input fallback. Critical for healthcare (DOB, appointments, prescriptions). ### ADR-001 Classification: Hybrid (Form Component) Properties control date constraints. Label/help via slots. ### API Design **Properties:** `name`, `value` (ISO 8601 date string), `min`, `max`, `label`, `required`, `disabled`, `error`, `help-text`, `format` (display format), `locale` **Slots:** Default (label), `help`, `error` **CSS Parts:** `input`, `calendar`, `day`, `month-nav`, `label`, `trigger` **Events:** `hx-change` (composed: true, detail: { value, date }) ### Drupal Integration ```twig Must be 18 or older for self-registration ``` ### ElementInternals: Submits ISO 8601 date string ### Healthcare: DOB entry, appointment scheduling, prescription dates, insurance expiry ### Acceptance Criteria 1. Calendar popup with month/year navigation 2. Text input with date format masking 3. Min/max date constraints (grey out unavailable dates) 4. Keyboard: full calendar navigation 5. Locale-aware date formatting 6. ElementInternals form participation 7. WCAG 2.1 AA: dialog calendar pattern, live region for month changes
title: T2-32: hx-date-picker — Calendar Date Selection

Verify each finding against the current code and only fix it if needed.

Inline comments:
In `@packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-date-picker/hx-date-picker.styles.ts`:
- Around line 342-344: Replace the hardcoded opacity 0.2 in the
.calendar__day--other-month.calendar__day--disabled rule with the project's
opacity design token (e.g., use the CSS variable or token name your design
system provides such as --hx-opacity-disabled or the theme token for disabled
opacity); update the rule in hx-date-picker.styles.ts to reference that token
and, if the token does not exist yet, add/align it in the token definitions so
the disabled other-month day uses the centralized opacity token instead of a
magic number.
- Around line 167-171: Replace the hardcoded rgba shadow fallbacks in the
hx-date-picker styles by using the design token(s) instead of literal colors:
update the box-shadow declaration for --hx-date-picker-calendar-shadow to
reference the appropriate token(s) (e.g., --hx-shadow-elevation-1 or a new
primitive/semantic shadow token such as --hx-shadow-calendar) and remove the raw
rgba(...) values; if the token does not exist, add a new CSS custom property at
the primitive/semantic level and consume that token here (refer to the
--hx-date-picker-calendar-shadow variable and the box-shadow usage in
hx-date-picker.styles.ts).
- Around line 320-330: Today indicator uses hardcoded sizing/offset
(0.2rem/0.25rem); update the .calendar__Day--today pseudo-element
(.calendar__day--today:not(.calendar__day--selected)::after) to use spacing
tokens instead: replace bottom: 0.2rem with bottom: var(--hx-spacing-xxs,
0.2rem) and width/height: 0.25rem with width: var(--hx-spacing-xs, 0.25rem) and
height: var(--hx-spacing-xs, 0.25rem); keep border-radius: 50% and existing
background-color but use fallbacks as shown so design tokens control sizing
while pre
